proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x3: T0 -> T3) { Option.some[NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3]](x0) != NaturalTransformation.new[T0, T1, T2, T3](x1, x2, x3) or x0.src_functor = x1 }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n, f, g, component)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x3: T0 -> T3) { Option.some[NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3]](x0) != NaturalTransformation.new[T0, T1, T2, T3](x1, x2, x3) or x0.dst_functor = x2 }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n, f, g, component)
let w0: O1 satisfy { component(w0) != n.component(w0) }

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x3: T0 -> T3, x4: T0) { Option.some[NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3]](x0) != NaturalTransformation.new[T0, T1, T2, T3](x1, x2, x3) or x0.component(x4) = x3(x4) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n, f, g, component, w0)

goal: NaturalTransformation.constraint[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: T0 -> T3) { NaturalTransformation.constraint[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) = is_natural_transformation[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component)
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { is_natural_transformation[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0.src_functor, x0.dst_functor, x0.component) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n)

goal: is_natural_transformation[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component) = (functors_parallel[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor) and nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component) and nat_trans_naturality_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: T0 -> T3) { (functors_parallel[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) and nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) and nat_trans_naturality_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2)) = is_natural_transformation[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component)

goal: functors_parallel[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor) = (n.src_functor.src_cat = n.dst_functor.src_cat and n.src_functor.dst_cat = n.dst_functor.dst_cat)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { (x0.src_cat = x1.src_cat and x0.dst_cat = x1.dst_cat) = functors_parallel[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor)

goal: is_natural_transformation[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component) = (functors_parallel[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor) and nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component) and nat_trans_naturality_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: T0 -> T3) { (functors_parallel[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) and nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) and nat_trans_naturality_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2)) = is_natural_transformation[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component)

goal: functors_parallel[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor) = (n.src_functor.src_cat = n.dst_functor.src_cat and n.src_functor.dst_cat = n.dst_functor.dst_cat)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { (x0.src_cat = x1.src_cat and x0.dst_cat = x1.dst_cat) = functors_parallel[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor)

goal: is_natural_transformation[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component) = (functors_parallel[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor) and nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component) and nat_trans_naturality_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: T0 -> T3) { (functors_parallel[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) and nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) and nat_trans_naturality_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2)) = is_natural_transformation[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component)

goal: nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component)

nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component) = forall(x0: O1) { n.src_functor.dst_cat.src(n.component(x0)) = n.src_functor.obj_map(x0) and n.src_functor.dst_cat.dst(n.component(x0)) = n.dst_functor.obj_map(x0) }
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T2, T1, T3], x1: T0 -> T3, x2: Functor[T0, T2, T1, T3]) { forall(x3: T0) { x0.obj_map(x3) = x0.dst_cat.src(x1(x3)) and x2.obj_map(x3) = x0.dst_cat.dst(x1(x3)) } = nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[T0, T2, T1, T3](x0, x2, x1) }[O1, O2, M1, M2](n.src_functor, n.component, n.dst_functor)
(forall(x0: O1) { n.src_functor.obj_map(x0) = n.src_functor.dst_cat.src(n.component(x0)) and n.dst_functor.obj_map(x0) = n.src_functor.dst_cat.dst(n.component(x0)) } = true)
function(x0: O1) { n.src_functor.obj_map(x0) = n.src_functor.dst_cat.src(n.component(x0)) and n.dst_functor.obj_map(x0) = n.src_functor.dst_cat.dst(n.component(x0)) }(x)

goal: is_natural_transformation[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component) = (functors_parallel[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor) and nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component) and nat_trans_naturality_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: T0 -> T3) { (functors_parallel[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) and nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) and nat_trans_naturality_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2)) = is_natural_transformation[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component)

goal: nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component)

nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component) = forall(x0: O1) { n.src_functor.dst_cat.src(n.component(x0)) = n.src_functor.obj_map(x0) and n.src_functor.dst_cat.dst(n.component(x0)) = n.dst_functor.obj_map(x0) }
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T2, T1, T3], x1: T0 -> T3, x2: Functor[T0, T2, T1, T3]) { forall(x3: T0) { x0.obj_map(x3) = x0.dst_cat.src(x1(x3)) and x2.obj_map(x3) = x0.dst_cat.dst(x1(x3)) } = nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[T0, T2, T1, T3](x0, x2, x1) }[O1, O2, M1, M2](n.src_functor, n.component, n.dst_functor)
(forall(x0: O1) { n.src_functor.obj_map(x0) = n.src_functor.dst_cat.src(n.component(x0)) and n.dst_functor.obj_map(x0) = n.src_functor.dst_cat.dst(n.component(x0)) } = true)
function(x0: O1) { n.src_functor.obj_map(x0) = n.src_functor.dst_cat.src(n.component(x0)) and n.dst_functor.obj_map(x0) = n.src_functor.dst_cat.dst(n.component(x0)) }(x)

goal: is_natural_transformation[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component) = (functors_parallel[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor) and nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component) and nat_trans_naturality_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: T0 -> T3) { (functors_parallel[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) and nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) and nat_trans_naturality_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2)) = is_natural_transformation[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component)

goal: nat_trans_naturality_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component)

nat_trans_naturality_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component) = forall(x0: M1) { n.src_functor.dst_cat.compose(n.component(n.src_functor.src_cat.dst(x0)), n.src_functor.mor_map(x0)) = n.src_functor.dst_cat.compose(n.dst_functor.mor_map(x0), n.component(n.src_functor.src_cat.src(x0))) }
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T3, T0, T2, T1], x1: Functor[T3, T0, T2, T1], x2: T3 -> T1) { forall(x3: T0) { x0.dst_cat.compose(x1.mor_map(x3), x2(x0.src_cat.src(x3))) = x0.dst_cat.compose(x2(x0.src_cat.dst(x3)), x0.mor_map(x3)) } = nat_trans_naturality_axiom[T3, T0, T2, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[M1, M2, O2, O1](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T3, T0, T2, T1], x1: Functor[T3, T0, T2, T1], x2: T3 -> T1) { forall(x3: T0) { x0.dst_cat.compose(x1.mor_map(x3), x2(x0.src_cat.src(x3))) = x0.dst_cat.compose(x2(x0.src_cat.dst(x3)), x0.mor_map(x3)) } = nat_trans_naturality_axiom[T3, T0, T2, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[M1, M2, O2, O1](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: T0 -> T3) { not nat_trans_naturality_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) or forall(x3: T1) { x0.dst_cat.compose(x1.mor_map(x3), x2(x0.src_cat.src(x3))) = x0.dst_cat.compose(x2(x0.src_cat.dst(x3)), x0.mor_map(x3)) } = true }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: T0 -> T3, x3: T1) { not nat_trans_naturality_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) or x0.dst_cat.compose(x2(x0.src_cat.dst(x3)), x0.mor_map(x3)) = x0.dst_cat.compose(x1.mor_map(x3), x2(x0.src_cat.src(x3))) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n.src_functor, n.dst_functor, n.component, m)

goal: identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f)(x) = identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, x)
identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, x) = f.dst_cat.identity(f.obj_map(x))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x1: T2) { x0.dst_cat.identity(x0.obj_map(x1)) = identity_nat_trans_component[T2, T3, T0, T1](x0, x1) }[O2, M2, O1, M1](f, x)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T2, T1, T3], x1: T0 -> T3, x2: Functor[T0, T2, T1, T3]) { forall(x3: T0) { x0.obj_map(x3) = x0.dst_cat.src(x1(x3)) and x2.obj_map(x3) = x0.dst_cat.dst(x1(x3)) } = nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[T0, T2, T1, T3](x0, x2, x1) }[O1, O2, M1, M2](f, identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f), f)
let w0: O1 satisfy { f.obj_map(w0) != f.dst_cat.src(identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, w0)) or f.obj_map(w0) != f.dst_cat.dst(identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, w0)) }
function(x0: O1) { f.dst_cat.dst(identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, x0)) = f.obj_map(x0) }(w0)
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x1: T2) { x0.dst_cat.identity(x0.obj_map(x1)) = identity_nat_trans_component[T2, T3, T0, T1](x0, x1) }[O2, M2, O1, M1](f, w0)
function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T0) { x0.src(x0.identity(x1)) = x1 }[O2, M2](f.dst_cat, f.obj_map(w0))

goal: identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f)(f.src_cat.dst(m)) = identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, f.src_cat.dst(m))

proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x1: T2) { x0.dst_cat.identity(x0.obj_map(x1)) = identity_nat_trans_component[T2, T3, T0, T1](x0, x1) }[O2, M2, O1, M1](f, f.src_cat.dst(m))
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x1: T2) { x0.dst_cat.identity(x0.obj_map(x1)) = identity_nat_trans_component[T2, T3, T0, T1](x0, x1) }[O2, M2, O1, M1](f, f.src_cat.dst(m))
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x1: T3) { x0.dst_cat.dst(x0.mor_map(x1)) = x0.obj_map(x0.src_cat.dst(x1)) }[O2, M2, O1, M1](f, m)
f.dst_cat.compose(f.dst_cat.identity(f.obj_map(f.src_cat.dst(m))), f.mor_map(m)) != f.mor_map(m)
f.dst_cat.compose(f.dst_cat.identity(f.obj_map(f.src_cat.dst(m))), f.mor_map(m)) = f.mor_map(m)

goal: identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f)(f.src_cat.src(m)) = identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, f.src_cat.src(m))

proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x1: T2) { x0.dst_cat.identity(x0.obj_map(x1)) = identity_nat_trans_component[T2, T3, T0, T1](x0, x1) }[O2, M2, O1, M1](f, f.src_cat.src(m))
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x1: T2) { x0.dst_cat.identity(x0.obj_map(x1)) = identity_nat_trans_component[T2, T3, T0, T1](x0, x1) }[O2, M2, O1, M1](f, f.src_cat.src(m))
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x1: T3) { x0.dst_cat.src(x0.mor_map(x1)) = x0.obj_map(x0.src_cat.src(x1)) }[O2, M2, O1, M1](f, m)
f.dst_cat.compose(f.mor_map(m), f.dst_cat.identity(f.obj_map(f.src_cat.src(m)))) != f.mor_map(m)
f.dst_cat.compose(f.mor_map(m), f.dst_cat.identity(f.obj_map(f.src_cat.src(m)))) = f.mor_map(m)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T3, T0, T2, T1], x1: Functor[T3, T0, T2, T1], x2: T3 -> T1) { forall(x3: T0) { x0.dst_cat.compose(x1.mor_map(x3), x2(x0.src_cat.src(x3))) = x0.dst_cat.compose(x2(x0.src_cat.dst(x3)), x0.mor_map(x3)) } = nat_trans_naturality_axiom[T3, T0, T2, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[M1, M2, O2, O1](f, f, identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f))

let w0: M1 satisfy { f.dst_cat.compose(f.mor_map(w0), identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, f.src_cat.src(w0))) != f.dst_cat.compose(identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, f.src_cat.dst(w0)), f.mor_map(w0)) }

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x1: T3) { x0.dst_cat.compose(x0.mor_map(x1), identity_nat_trans_component[T2, T3, T0, T1](x0, x0.src_cat.src(x1))) = x0.mor_map(x1) }[O2, M2, O1, M1](f, w0)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x1: T3) { x0.dst_cat.compose(identity_nat_trans_component[T2, T3, T0, T1](x0, x0.src_cat.dst(x1)), x0.mor_map(x1)) = x0.mor_map(x1) }[O2, M2, O1, M1](f, w0)

f.dst_cat.compose(identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, f.src_cat.dst(w0)), f.mor_map(w0)) != f.dst_cat.compose(f.mor_map(w0), identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, f.src_cat.src(w0)))

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { (x0.src_cat = x1.src_cat and x0.dst_cat = x1.dst_cat) = functors_parallel[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, f)
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { nat_trans_naturality_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x0, identity_nat_trans_component[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0)) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](f)
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x0, identity_nat_trans_component[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0)) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](f)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: T0 -> T3) { (functors_parallel[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) and nat_trans_endpoints_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) and nat_trans_naturality_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2)) = is_natural_transformation[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, f, identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f))

goal: exists(k0: NaturalTransformation[O1, M1, O2, M2]) { NaturalTransformation.new[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, f, identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f)) = Option.some(k0) }
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: T0 -> T3) { NaturalTransformation.constraint[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) = is_natural_transformation[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, f, identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f))

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: T0 -> T3) { not NaturalTransformation.constraint[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) or exists(k0: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { Option.some[NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3]](k0) = NaturalTransformation.new[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) } }[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, f, identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f))

goal: exists(k0: NaturalTransformation[O1, M1, O2, M2]) { NaturalTransformation.new[O1, M1, O2, M2](f, f, identity_nat_trans_component[O1, M1, O2, M2](f)) = Option.some(k0) }
